g.title: GatedAdapterBEVDetOccLidar

g.title: cluster_frontend
g.text: Shared front-end before the ablation point

g.title: cluster_adapter
g.text: gated_adapter: inserted between token_projector and LSSDepthLift

g.title: lidar_memory
g.text: voxelize raw LiDAR into memory volume

g.title: sparse_depth_loss
g.text: NOTE: ablation script leaves this ON

g.title: warper
g.text: warp 5 frame volumes to target velo grid

g.title: token_projector
g.text: project fused tokens to LSS channels

g.title: legend1
g.text: Orange solid path = new gated_adapter architecture

g.title: legend2
g.text: Gray dashed path = original baseline bypass / inactive branch

g.title: legend3
g.text: Key modification: only LSS input feature is changed
rest of LiDAR memory, warping, temporal reduce, and BEVDetOcc head stay the same
